languages.text: {n}Кассия подносит руку ко рту и замирает.{/n} "Это... не их цвета. Словно что-то гнусное мазнуло поверх, перекрыв обычные оттенки, скрыв истину!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Кассия подносит руку ко рту и замирает.{/n} "Это... не их цвета. Словно что-то гнусное мазнуло поверх, перекрыв обычные оттенки, скрыв истину!"
traits.speaker: CassiaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"
languages.original_text: {n}Кассия подносит руку ко рту и замирает.{/n} "Это... не их цвета. Словно что-то гнусное мазнуло поверх, перекрыв обычные оттенки, скрыв истину!"

languages.text: {n}Cassia se lleva la mano a la boca y se queda inmóvil.{/n} «Esos... esos colores no son los suyos. Es como si algo inmundo se hubiera esparcido por encima, ¡tapando los tonos habituales y ocultando la verdad!».
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia se lleva la mano a la boca y se queda inmóvil.{/n} «Esos... esos colores no son los suyos. Es como si algo inmundo se hubiera esparcido por encima, ¡tapando los tonos habituales y ocultando la verdad!».

languages.text: {n}卡西娅抬手掩住嘴，整个人僵住了。{/n}“那些……那根本不是他们应有的色彩。就好像有什么污秽的东西，被抹遍了他们全身，将惯常的色彩尽数遮蔽，掩盖了真相！”
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}卡西娅抬手掩住嘴，整个人僵住了。{/n}“那些……那根本不是他们应有的色彩。就好像有什么污秽的东西，被抹遍了他们全身，将惯常的色彩尽数遮蔽，掩盖了真相！”

languages.text: {n}Cassia porte une main à sa bouche et se fige.{/n} « Ce... ce ne sont pas leurs couleurs. C'est comme si une force néfaste avait déteint sur eux. Elle souille leurs nuances naturelles, elle dissimule la vérité ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia porte une main à sa bouche et se fige.{/n} « Ce... ce ne sont pas leurs couleurs. C'est comme si une force néfaste avait déteint sur eux. Elle souille leurs nuances naturelles, elle dissimule la vérité ! »

languages.text: {n}Cassia, elini ağzına götürüp donakalıyor.{/n} "Renkleri... Renkleri bu değil. Sanki üzerlerine iğrenç bir şey sürülmüş. Her zamanki renkler bastırılmış, gerçek gizlenmiş gibi!"
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia, elini ağzına götürüp donakalıyor.{/n} "Renkleri... Renkleri bu değil. Sanki üzerlerine iğrenç bir şey sürülmüş. Her zamanki renkler bastırılmış, gerçek gizlenmiş gibi!"

languages.text: {n}Cassia hält sich die Hand vor den Mund und erstarrt.{/n} "Das ... das sind nicht ihre Farben. Es ist, als hätte sie etwas Böses übermalt, um die normalen Töne zu überdecken und die Wahrheit zu verbergen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Cassia hält sich die Hand vor den Mund und erstarrt.{/n} "Das ... das sind nicht ihre Farben. Es ist, als hätte sie etwas Böses übermalt, um die normalen Töne zu überdecken und die Wahrheit zu verbergen!"

languages.text: {n}カシアは口元を手で覆い、凍りついたように立ち尽くす。{/n}「あの...あの色は、彼らのものではない。何か不浄なものが塗られたかのように、本来の色を消し、真実を隠しているのだ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Cassia raises her hand to her mouth and freezes.{/n} "Those... those are not their colours. It is as if something vile has been smeared over them, blotting out the usual hues, concealing the truth!"
